question.label: Stretch now
question.name: Which part of your current work is actually stretching you right now?
question.description: Distinguishes comfort-zone execution from genuine growth moments.

answer: Part of it is confidence, I do not want to look unprepared in senior forums.

assessment.note: He names low confidence in senior forums as the stretch point, signaling a real growth edge with some hesitation to lean into it.

new_queue.label: Senior forums
new_queue.name: Senior forums — what about those rooms makes you feel unprepared?

new_queue.label: Scope definition
new_queue.name: When you think about the next-level Head of Product role, what does good actually look like to you?

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?

new_queue.label: Tradeoff ask
new_queue.name: What would you stop doing if you wanted to spend more time on strategic ownership?

new_queue.label: First move
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to start first?

issues: coverage: injected engagement into next question (0 touches after turn 4)

history.answer_excerpt: Part of it is confidence, I do not want to look unprepared in senior forums.
I know I want bigger scope, but I still spend too much time in execution details.
When conversations get political, I tend to retreat to what I can deliver directly.
I can run projects, but shaping cross-org alignment is where I hesitate.
